zh: 一般說來第一個孩子原有的王國、
en: Generally speaking, the first child's original kingdom

zh: 會因突然再有一個孩子闖進來、
en: is suddenly invaded when another child enters,
and they feel tense and threatened.

zh: 他會發現父母不再以他為主、
en: They notice their parents are no longer centered on them,

zh: 他受到的注意力被分散、
en: that the attention they receive has been divided,

zh: 於是嫉妒之情油然而生、
他實在弄不懂為什麼爸爸媽媽要和新生的弟弟妹妹們特別好、
en: They really can't understand why mom and dad are so good to the new baby,

zh: 而這親近原因是他一個人專屬的、
en: when they believed that closeness belonged to them alone.

zh: 於是孩子會哭鬧、或打人、推人、
en: So the child may cry, throw tantrums, hit, or push,
wet the bed, suck their fingers, have nightmares,
all to draw their parents' attention.
